description_long: This is a modern, minimalist bench constructed from a series of evenly spaced, parallel slats, all finished in a uniform blue color. The seat is flat and rectangular, supported by two wide, vertical legs at either end, which are slightly curved for added stability and visual interest. The slatted design allows for airflow and water drainage, making it suitable for outdoor environments. The bench lacks both a backrest and armrests, emphasizing a clean, functional aesthetic. The material appears to be painted or coated wood, giving it a hard, matte surface. Its simple, robust construction suggests it is designed for public spaces such as parks, plazas, or sidewalks.
description: A blue, slatted wooden bench with a flat seat and two wide, curved legs, designed in a minimalist style. It has no backrest or armrests and is suitable for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the bench, highlighting the slatted seat and the curved end of one supporting leg.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bench, the flat seat, and both wide, curved supporting legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the slatted seat and the opposite curved leg.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the same flat seat and wide, curved legs visible.
